data.title: S&T Bancorp, Inc. authorizes $100 million share repurchase program for S&T Bank, replacing the old program.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, S&T Bancorp, Inc. disclosed plans for a $100 million share repurchase program. The holding company for S&T Bank, listed as STBA on the NASDAQ, confirmed the authorization by its board of directors during a meeting on January 21, 2026. This new initiative will replace the previous program in place.

data.title: EV Group acquires majority share in Cornelius Polska, a Polish distributor of specialty chemicals. Helsinki-based EV Group continues to expand its European presence.
data.description: In PERO (MI), Italy, Eigenmann & Veronelli Group ("EV Group"), a top distributor and producer of specialty chemicals and food ingredients, has finalized a deal to purchase the majority stake in Cornelius Polska. Founded in Poland in 2007, with its base in Warsaw, Cornelius Polska acts as a reputable distributor of specialty chemicals, playing a crucial role as a primary ally to global suppliers and maintaining a wide-ranging and varied clientele. This acquisition marks a significant move for EV Group in expanding its reach into the Polish market.

data.title: SLS Playa Mujeres introduces kosher dining program Liora, offering rabbinically supervised meals for eligible stays in Cancún.
data.description: CANCÚN, Mexico - On January 22, 2026, SLS Playa Mujeres introduced "Liora," a new offering providing rabbinically supervised kosher meals at select restaurants, in-room dining, and Shabbat services. This exclusive option is now available as an add-on package for eligible guests staying at the resort.

data.title: Ticketbud will be powering craft events across the US in 2026, including QuiltCon, Road to California Quilters' Conference, and American Craft Made Baltimore.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on January 22, 2026, various craft and maker events across the U.S. are opting for Ticketbud for streamlined processes. These events include QuiltCon in Raleigh, NC, Road to California Quilters' Conference in Ontario, CA, and American Craft Made Baltimore in Maryland. Ticketbud's services are being preferred for their efficiency and ease of use at leading industry gatherings.

data.title: ECS makes it to #4 on the 2025 Top 250 MSSP List.
data.description: A new report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 5.6% in the next year. This growth is attributed to increasing consumer confidence and robust investment activities. Emerging markets are forecasted to see a growth rate of around 6.3%, outpacing the growth of advanced economies. Additionally, it is projected that unemployment rates will decline by 1.5%, reaching a low of 5.2% globally. The report suggests that the recovery from the pandemic-induced economic downturn is well underway, with the global GDP expected to surpass $90 trillion by the end of the year.

data.title: Chad DuBeau promoted to Chief Investment Officer at Mill Creek Residential, overseeing multifamily residential development and acquisitions. Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: A key founding partner will take charge of overseeing the development and acquisitions for multifamily residential properties. Located in Boca Raton, Florida, the company in focus is Mill Creek Residential, renowned for its expertise in developing, managing, and investing in high-quality rental housing throughout the United States. The news was shared on January 22, 2026, and underscores the commitment to expanding and enhancing the company's portfolio in the market.

data.title: PayPal to acquire Cymbio, boosting AI commerce capabilities for many merchants. Acquisition announced on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: In a move that will potentially impact tens of millions of merchants, Cymbio has been acquired by PayPal Holdings, Inc. This acquisition aims to make merchants more accessible on top artificial intelligence platforms. The agreement was announced on January 22, 2026, and with PayPal's involvement (NASDAQ: PYPL), this development could significantly affect the discoverability of a large number of merchants globally.

data.title: Southern First Bancshares reported Q4 2025 results with $xxM revenue, ending year with $xxxM revenue, overall positive growth.
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina, on January 22, 2026, Southern First Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFST), the parent company of Southern First Bank, revealed its financial performance for the periods ending December 31, 2025. They expressed delight in announcing their fourth-quarter results.

data.title: Awardco ranked as a top leader in Winter 2026 G2 Reports for employee recognition and rewards, showcasing sustained market leadership.
data.description: Awardco, a prominent employee recognition and rewards platform, maintains its strong market position with consistent acknowledgment in the areas of employee recognition, rewards, and incentives. The company, based in Salt Lake City, has recently received further recognition from G2 in its Winter report of 2026. This highlights Awardco's continued leadership in the industry.

data.title: Natural Grocers® celebrates Kansas Day with special gift and savings from Jan. 29-31, 2026 at 8 Kansas stores.
data.description: In Lakewood, Colorado on January 22, 2026, Natural Grocers®, the top family-operated organic and natural grocery retailer in the U.S., is hosting the Celebrate Kansas Day event from January 29 to 31 at its eight stores in Kansas. Customers can join in the Kansas Day festivities at the stores...

data.title: CUPE Ontario to speak at 2026 pre-budget consultations with 300,000+ members; press conference at 12:15 pm.
data.description: In Niagara Falls, Fred Hahn, the president of CUPE Ontario, is set to address the Standing Committee on Finance and Economic Affairs on Thursday for the 2026 pre-budget consultations. Preceding this, CUPE Ontario will conduct a press conference at 12:15 p.m. The union boasts over 300,000 members, making it the largest in the province. A notable portion of these workers are engaged in crucial social service sectors such as developmental services, child welfare, child care, and community health centers.
